text.title: Laravel Enterprise Patterns Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply enterprise Laravel patterns end-to-end.

step.name: scaffold-formrequest-and-action
step.action: Create `<Verb><Subject>Request` with rules + authorize. Create `<Verb><Subject>Action` with constructor-injected dependencies and single `__invoke` taking the validated DTO.
step.decision-gate: If controller uses `$request->all()`, BLOCK per `validated-not-all` rule.

step.name: add-api-resource
step.action: Add `<Subject>Resource` with `toArray()` returning an explicit literal array of attributes. Add a Pest feature test asserting the response keys match.
step.decision-gate: If Resource uses `$this->all()` or spread, BLOCK per `api-resource-explicit-fields` rule.

step.name: wrap-multistep-writes
step.action: Wrap multi-step writes in `DB::transaction(fn() => ...)`. Dispatch mail/queue jobs via `DB::afterCommit(...)` so side effects fire only on commit.
step.decision-gate: If `Mail::send` runs inside the transaction, BLOCK per `db-transaction-for-multistep-writes` rule.

step.name: implement-shouldbeunique-job
step.input: Job spec (target external service, retry policy)
step.action: Implement `ShouldBeUnique` + `uniqueId()` keyed on the work payload. Use exponential backoff. Persist idempotency markers as needed.
step.decision-gate: If `ShouldBeUnique` is missing on a mutating job, BLOCK per `shouldbeunique-on-jobs` rule.

step.name: add-tests-and-prevent-lazy-loading
step.action: Enable `Model::preventLazyLoading(! app()->isProduction())` in `AppServiceProvider::boot`. Add feature tests with RefreshDatabase. Add `query-budget.php` assertion limiting queries per endpoint.
